# InsightMatches

> AI platform connecting Korean researchers, universities and SMEs with EU R&D funding partners across Horizon Europe, EIC, Erasmus+, and Interreg programmes.

InsightMatches is a multilingual (English, Korean, French) SaaS that uses AI to match research teams with relevant EU R&D calls across four major programmes: Horizon Europe, European Innovation Council (EIC), Erasmus+ (CBHE), and Interreg. It identifies consortium partners across EU institutions and accelerates proposal preparation. It also powers SENS, an event matchmaking tool for EU-Korea R&D events.

## Pages

- [Home](/): AI matchmaking for Horizon Europe consortia and EU-Korea R&D funding.
- [Platform](/platform): Product features — funding discovery, consortium building, AI proposal drafting.
- [About](/about): Company mission, story, and partner network bridging Europe and Asia.
- [Resources](/resources): Hub of guides, insights and news for EU R&D funding.
- [Horizon Europe Guide](/resources/horizon-europe): In-depth overview of Horizon Europe for non-EU researchers.
- [Horizon Europe × Korea Guide](/resources/guide-horizon-europe-korea): Practical guide for Korean participants in Horizon Europe.
- [AI Tools for EU-Korea Consortia](/resources/ai-tools-eu-korea-consortium): How AI accelerates EU-Korea consortium building.
- [EU-Korea Digital Partnership](/resources/eu-korea-digital-partnership): Background on the EU-Korea Digital Partnership and funding implications.
- [Insights](/resources/insights): Analysis and editorial on EU R&D funding trends.
- [News](/resources/news): Announcements from the EU research funding ecosystem.
- [Notice Board](/notice-board): Announcements, calls, and updates from the InsightMatches team.
- [Education](/education): Training and educational resources on EU funding.
- [Network Busan](/network-busan): EU-Korea innovation network activity in Busan.
- [Dissemination](/dissemination): Communication, dissemination and exploitation services.
- [EU PIC Information](/eu-pic): Legal information (PIC, OID) for EU proposals.
- [R&D Day 2026](/rndday): Archive page for the R&D Day event.
- [Gender Equality Plan](/about/gep): Public Gender Equality Plan.

## Korean

- [Home (한국어)](/ko/): InsightMatches in Korean.
- [Horizon Europe (한국어)](/ko/horizon-europe): Horizon Europe overview in Korean.

## Optional

- [KBA](/kba): KBA partnership page.
